headline: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP TO HOLD CONFERENCE CALL ON FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS
summary: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) has scheduled a conference call for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, Thursday, April 30, 2026, to discuss the company's first quarter 2026 financial results. The call will be simultaneously webcast on the company's investor relations website, rclinvestor.com. A replay of the webcast will remain available at the same website for 30 days following the call.

headline: Should You Chase the Rally in Royal Caribbean Stock Today?
summary: Royal Caribbean stock rallies as Pakistan brokers a ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. JPMorgan recommends owning RCL shares in 2026.

headline: Ceasefire Ignites Wall Street's Best Day in a Year: Oil Craters, Cyclicals Surge, and the Iran Clock Is Still Ticking
summary: Wednesday handed investors something they hadn't seen since early 2025: a genuine risk-on session where almost everyone won, unless you happened to own energy stocks. A last-minute US-Iran ceasefire brokered by Pakistan sent oil off a cliff and lifted every sector that had been crushed by rising energy costs.

headline: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of cruise vacation company Royal Caribbean (NYSE:RCL) jumped 6.5% in the afternoon session after President Trump's Truth Social post confirmed a suspension of military action in Iran for two weeks.
